heading: Jurisdiction
label: 2497b Jurisdiction
text: Legislation in the Senate of the United States amending section 2497 or 2497a of this title shall be referred to the Committee on Finance of the Senate.
notes: Codificationand enacted identical sections. was repealed by .Pub. L. 110–234Pub. L. 110–246Pub. L. 110–234section 4(a) of Pub. L. 110–246
